_note: card_active (island 5) is a HOLLOW gold frame; slice_islands re-fills its enclosed cyan interior opaque, so after intake the caller re-keys ui/map/card_active.png ONCE with chroma_key (key=#06CAFE tol=0.46) — this knocks the interior transparent AND clears the cyan glow/fringe bleeding through the frame's soft edge (chroma_key only zeroes alpha + keeps RGB, so the result is identical to keying a fresh slice at tol 0.46). Deterministic from this source + that documented command. card_locked (island 6) bakes its own dark scene + flower-lock medallion. lock_flower (island 11) is the standalone blue medallion; back_arrow (island 13) is the brown left arrow centered on back_frame (island 9 — the round gold ring + cream face + corner flower, the place-picker's back button per the map.png reference).
